MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO DEFTS MTN TO STRIKE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOASBERG, ALBERT L.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ARAG INSURANCE COMPANY MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT FOR FRAUD AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION TO STRIKE GRANTED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES CLAIM. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS THAT SUPPORT MALICE, FRAUD, OR OPPRESSION. MOTION TO STRIKE DENIED AS TO REMAINING ISSUES. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOASBERG, ALBERT L. AS TO DEFENDANT ARAG INSURANCE COMPANY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-26-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-30-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-11-2009
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ARAG INSURANCE COMPANY NOTICE OF HEARING RE: DEMURRER. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER OVERRULED IN PART AND SUSTAINED IN PART. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT AND SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR COMMON COUNTS. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE THE NAMES OF THE PERSONS WHO MADE THE FRAUDULENT REPRESENTATIONS, THEIR AUTHORITY TO SPEAK, TO WHOM THEY SPOKE, WHAT THEY SAID OR WROTE, AND WHEN IT WAS SAID OR WRITTEN. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

Notice Of Hearing Re: Demurrer, Demurrer, And Memorandum Ofp/A In Support Thereof Defts Demurrer;
Off Calendar Oct-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ARAG INSURANCE COMPANY Notice of Hearing Re: Demurrer. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer overruled in part and sustained in part. Demurrer overruled as to the first cause of action for breach of contract and second cause of action for common counts. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend as to third cause of action. Plaintiff to allege the names of the persons who made the fraudulent representations, their authority to speak, to whom they spoke, what they said or wrote, and when it was said or written. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Pltfs Complaint For Fraud And Punitive Damages, Memorandum Of P/A In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Oct-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ARAG INSURANCE COMPANY Motion to Strike Portions of Plaintiff's Complaint for Fraud and Punitive Damages. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to strike granted with ten days leave to amend as to punitive damages claim. Plaintiff must plead facts that support malice, fraud, or oppression. Motion to strike denied as to remaining issues. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
